questions.question: What is the main action being performed with the greens in the bowl?
questions.answer_key: Tossing or mixing leafy greens in a wooden bowl
questions.rationale: Core action that defines the entire clip and cooking activity shown.

questions.question: What type of container is being used to hold the food?
questions.answer_key: A large wooden bowl with handles
questions.rationale: Essential setting detail that frames the entire cooking preparation scene.

questions.question: What is the primary ingredient visible in the bowl?
questions.answer_key: Fresh leafy greens, appearing to be salad greens or lettuce

questions.question: How many hands are visible performing the action?
questions.answer_key: Two hands belonging to one person
questions.rationale: Clarifies that a single person is performing the food preparation task.

questions.question: What is visible on the work surface beside the bowl?
questions.answer_key: A wooden cutting board with what appears to be white cheese or dairy product
